final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for cross-border e-commerce promotion (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs an artistic typography aesthetic with layered fonts — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 aspect ratio, must have products or subjects overlapping and partially obscuring text elements, needs a complex but not cluttered layout
Subject: must include products or main subjects as focal elements
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must have artistic typography with font stacking; must have products/subjects partially blocking text; must achieve visual complexity without clutter; must be 16:9 ratio
Avoid: must avoid chaotic or messy composition
